channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tech Sector Dominance Raises Valuation Concerns for Investors
item.description: The tech sector is currently experiencing extraordinary growth, reminiscent of the late 1990s dotcom boom, with stocks in the S&P 500 showing record-high valuations. After a robust earnings season, ma...

item.title: Federal Judge Condemns ICE for Targeted Arrest and Publicizing It Online
item.description: A federal judge has strongly criticized U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) for orchestrating a highly publicized arrest of Christian Cerna, a 28-year-old carpenter from Boyle Heights, foll...

item.title: John Mbadi Responds to Winnie Odinga's Criticism, Emphasises Experience and Political Record
item.description: National Treasury CS John Mbadi has hit back at EALA legislator Winnie Odinga following her recent comments on his political conduct. Speaking at a funeral in Kisii, Winnie Odinga accused Mbadi of usi...

item.title: Manitoba Premier Wab Kinew Addresses Potential Impact of Social Media and AI Ban on Classroom YouTube Use
item.description: Manitoba Premier Wab Kinew has indicated that the province's upcoming ban on social media and AI chatbots for children will likely prohibit teachers from using YouTube in classrooms due to features li...

item.title: Court Orders Zuma and Thales Arms Deal Trial to Proceed Despite Pending Appeals
item.description: The Pietermaritzburg High Court has ruled that the long-delayed arms deal trial involving former president Jacob Zuma and Thales must proceed, despite ongoing appeal applications. Judge Nkosinathi Chi...

item.title: Graviitalbeats Launches Platform to Protect Nigerian Artists and Producers from Fraud
item.description: For too long, Nigerian artists and producers don dey suffer for one kain broken system. Sometimes, artist go pay producer upfront for custom beat but the beat no show. Other times, producer go spend d...

item.title: Amazon ends support for older Kindles, prompting users to modify devices
item.description: Amazon announced that it will end technical support for several older Kindle models on May 20, 2026. Affected devices include early generations of Kindle e-readers and Kindle Fire tablets, such as the...

item.title: The Impact of Public Voting on Eurovision’s Music and Politics
item.description: The Eurovision Song Contest has evolved far beyond a simple music competition. Originally decided by expert juries when it began in 1956, the contest now relies heavily on public voting, social media ...

item.title: Key Business and Investment Updates: Alphabet Bond Deal, Honda EV Project Suspension, and Summer Travel Challenges
item.description: This week in Canadian business and investing news covers major developments across multiple sectors. Honda Canada has indefinitely suspended its $15-billion electric-vehicle project in Ontario, citing...

item.title: Bangladesh faces dual health threats from dengue and measles amid weak preparedness
item.description: Bangladesh is showing early warning signs of another serious dengue outbreak, following one of the deadliest episodes globally in 2023, which killed over 1,700 people. As of May 10, 2026, the country ...

item.title: An Insight into the Guardian’s 100 Best Novels of All Time
item.description: The Guardian has compiled a list of the 100 best novels of all time, drawing on the votes of over 170 authors, critics, and academics worldwide. The selection process allowed participants to rank thei...

item.title: Alberta and Ottawa Agree on Carbon Tax Deal Involving $600M Provincial Contribution
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith recently announced a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with the federal government aimed at tightening the province’s carbon policies while supporting pipeline developme...

item.title: URC Quarter-Final Scenarios: Lions Secure Spot, Bulls Aim for Home Advantage
item.description: For the first time since the United Rugby Championship began in 2021, the Lions have secured a spot in the quarter-finals, regardless of their final league match against Munster in Limerick. Their qua...

item.title: Tanzania earns over 3 billion shillings from ecotourism due to more visitors
item.description: Tanzania is seeing a big boom in tourism revenues, especially from ecotourism. The latest figures show that the country earned more than 3 billion Tanzanian shillings thanks to a noticeable increase i...

item.title: Philippine Military Academy Class of 2026: Combining Tradition and Modern Military Skills
item.description: The Philippine Military Academy (PMA) marked the graduation of its Talang Dangal Class of 2026, comprising 207 cadets trained under a blend of traditional and future-focused military programs. While f...

item.title: Law Minister clarifies no 28th Constitutional Amendment proposed yet
item.description: LAHORE: Law Minister Azam Nazeer Tarar on Saturday clarified that, as of now, there is no indication of a 28th Constitutional Amendment in Pakistan. Speaking after a conference on minority rights, he ...

item.title: Matt Frawley reflects on past tackle and first Canberra Raiders Cup win
item.description: Former Canberra Raiders players Matt Frawley and Elliott Whitehead recently faced off in the Canberra Raiders Cup, marking their first encounter since a notable moment in the English Super League. Las...

item.title: Labour Faces Leadership Debate as Wes Streeting Endorses Burnham for Makerfield By-Election
item.description: Wes Streeting, the former UK health secretary, delivered his first speech since resigning from the role, signalling his intention to challenge the Labour leadership while endorsing Andy Burnham for th...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi Demands Education Minister's Removal Amid NEET Leak; Tamil Nadu Cabinet Portfolios Announced
item.description: In today’s top political developments, Congress leader Rahul Gandhi has demanded the removal of Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan following the NEET-UG 2026 paper leak, which he says has aff...

item.title: Ensuring Fair Treatment for El-Rufai Amid ICPC Investigation
item.description: The ongoing clash between the Independent Corrupt Practices Commission (ICPC) and Nasir El-Rufai's family is turning into more than a normal corruption probe. This case now tests if Nigerian instituti...
